# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ArtifactURL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL where the artifact can be downloaded')
    }

    stages {        
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "curl -O ${params.ArtifactURL}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Make sure the SSH_AGENT is running and has keys
                    sshagent(['my-ssh-key']) {
                        // Assuming your production server information
                        def prodServer = 'prod-user@prod-server'
                        
                        // Assuming artifact name here, should be changed according to actual artifact name
                        def artifactName = 'artifact.zip'
                        
                        // Transfer artifact to the production server
                        sh "scp ${artifactName} ${prodServer}:~/"
                        
                        // Execute deployment script on the production server
                        // Assuming a deployment script is available at the destination
                        sh "ssh ${prodServer} '~/deploy.sh'"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
